label: Contact Form
description: Styled form with email and message fields. Works with Formspree and Netlify Forms out of the box, with accessible client-side validation.

label: Feature Grid
description: A responsive grid of feature cards, each with an icon, heading, and description. Great for highlighting what makes your product or service stand out.

label: Image Gallery
description: A masonry-style photo gallery with lightbox support. Click any thumbnail to view the full image with next/previous navigation.

label: Logo Cloud
description: A grid of client or partner logos with optional links. Builds trust by showing who you work with.

label: Modal
description: An accessible dialog component triggered by a button. Traps focus, responds to Escape, and works without JavaScript for progressive enhancement.

label: Newsletter Signup
description: An email capture form that integrates with Mailchimp, ConvertKit, or any service that accepts a POST with an email field.

label: Pricing Table
description: A side-by-side comparison of pricing tiers, each with a feature list and call-to-action button. Includes a highlighted recommended plan.

label: Social Share
description: Sharing buttons for Twitter/X, Facebook, LinkedIn, and email, plus a copy-link button. Works without a CDN or third-party scripts.

label: Stats Counter
description: Animated number counters that tick up when they scroll into view. Perfect for showing metrics, milestones, or business highlights.

label: Tabs
description: An accessible tabbed content switcher with ARIA roles and keyboard navigation. Organises related content without separate pages.

label: Testimonials
description: A grid of customer or client quotes with name, title, and optional avatar. Adds social proof to any page.

label: Timeline
description: A vertical timeline of events or milestones, each with a date, heading, and description. Great for company history or project roadmaps.
